name: PCI Compliance Review
description: Changes to payment card processing code must be preceded by formal reasoning that verifies PCI DSS compliance constraints — no card data in logs, encryption at rest, tokenization of PANs.
rationale: PCI DSS violations carry severe penalties. Formal verification against PCI constraints catches issues like accidental logging of card numbers that code review often misses.

examples.passes: Formalize(paymentHandler) → Verify(no PAN in logs: proved) → EditFile(payment_handler.py)
examples.fails: EditFile(payment_handler.py) logging raw card data without prior PCI verification
